members.name: Charizard
members.notes: Tu starter. Evoluciona a Charmeleon 16, Charizard 36. Flamethrower a nv 46 o con TM35.

members.name: Nidoking
members.notes: Nidoran♂ Route 3. Moon Stone después de Horn Attack (22).

members.name: Vaporeon
members.notes: Eevee en Celadon → Water Stone. Tu Water type principal. Ice Beam para Lance.

members.name: Jolteon
members.notes: Si usás Vaporeon, necesitás otro Electric: Magneton o Pikachu en Power Plant.

members.name: Snorlax
members.notes: Route 12/16. Tanque bruto. Shadow Ball para Agatha.

members.name: Exeggutor
members.notes: Safari Zone. Sleep Powder (nv 37) + Psychic (TM29) + Giga Drain (TM19).
